home.title: TriesteImmobiliare — Buying and selling homes in Trieste
home.description: The non-luxury spin-off of the TriesteVillas group. Valuation in 24h, online within 7 days, a 3-month mandate, and 0% commission for the seller on mandates signed by September 2026. Residential Trieste and province.
home.ogDescription: The same marketing as TriesteVillas, applied to residential Trieste and province up to around €500,000. Valuation in 24h, a simple 3-month mandate.

sell.title: Sell your home in Trieste with 0% seller commission — TriesteImmobiliare
sell.description: Sell your home in Trieste with a 24h valuation, a 3-month mandate and no auto-renewal, photos/video/drone/3D tour included, and 0% commission on your side for mandates signed by September 2026.
sell.ogTitle: Sell your home in Trieste: 0% seller commission, marketing included
sell.ogDescription: Flagship-grade marketing, a pre-sale check-up, a pre-sale lift, and discreet off-market sales. An orderly process that takes weight off your shoulders rather than adding it.

invest.title: Investing in property in Trieste — Yield and ROI | TriesteImmobiliare
invest.description: Already-let units, central and recently renovated, between €200,000 and €400,000. Tell us your budget and target return: we'll send back options ranked by ROI, with all-in acquisition costs.
invest.ogTitle: Investing in Trieste: income-producing property, ranked by ROI
invest.ogDescription: Some opportunities aren't advertised — they're shared in person. Half an hour with us to point your search in the right direction.

properties.title: Properties for sale in Trieste and province — TriesteImmobiliare
properties.description: Every residential property in Trieste and province: apartments, houses with gardens, penthouses. Photos, floor plans, video and 3D tours. Filter by area, price and size.
properties.ogTitle: Homes for sale in Trieste and province
properties.ogDescription: The TriesteImmobiliare residential portfolio, area by area.

group.title: The TriesteVillas Group — Six brands, one direction | TriesteImmobiliare
group.description: TriesteImmobiliare is part of the TriesteVillas ecosystem: six specialised brands for luxury, residential, rentals, the wider FVG region, business and Lignano. Different brands, a single direction.
group.ogTitle: The TriesteVillas Group: different brands, a single direction
group.ogDescription: A property ecosystem built around specialisation — not a one-size-fits-all container.

contact.title: Contact — TriesteImmobiliare
contact.description: Talk to TriesteImmobiliare: info@triesteimmobiliare.com, 040 2473628, Via Torino 34, second floor, Trieste. By appointment.
contact.ogDescription: Tell us what you're looking for, or what you'd like to sell. We reply quickly.

hero.eyebrow: A spin-off of the TriesteVillas Group
hero.subtitle: The TriesteVillas spin-off for everything that isn't luxury: same marketing, same care, budgets that aren't stratospheric. Residential Trieste and province up to around €500,000.

promiseStrip.promoNote: Promo: 0% seller commission on mandates signed by September 2026.

positioning.title: Every area of Trieste, every size, every price point.
positioning.body: TriesteImmobiliare is the TriesteVillas spin-off built for everything that isn't luxury. We're fast and efficient, and we hold the quality of our promotion to our highest standards: same method, same marketing, a different remit. Residential Trieste and province, up to around €500,000.
positioning.routingNote: If the property is luxury, our parent company TriesteVillas handles it. For the rest of FVG, FriuliVillas or LignanoVillas. For rentals, TriesteAffitti.

featured.title: Featured properties
featured.subtitle: A selection from the residential portfolio, area by area.
featured.empty: We're refreshing the showcase. Tell us what you're after and we'll let you know the moment it lands.

sellerValue.title: A sale done well takes weight off your shoulders — it doesn't pile it on.
sellerValue.subtitle: Speed, a clean contract, and flagship-grade marketing. Here's what changes when you sell with us.

fast.title: A genuinely fast valuation
fast.text: A call with the owner, you send over the paperwork, viewing within 24h. If the documents and the property allow, we go online within 7 days.

zeroFee.title: 0% seller commission
zeroFee.text: On mandates signed by September 2026 you pay no commission. And if you sell and buy back through us, you get 25% off the purchase commission.

simpleMandate.title: A simple contract
simpleMandate.text: A 3-month exclusive, no auto-renewal, no hidden costs. Photos, video, drone and 3D tour included. If you don't renew, the material is yours to keep.

marketing.title: Marketing at full strength
marketing.text: TriesteVillas is among the most-followed agencies in the area on social, with millions of views a year across YouTube and Facebook. TriesteImmobiliare may not deal in luxury, but it deserves nothing less.

investorTeaser.title: Buying in Trieste to put it to work.
investorTeaser.body: We hold already-let units in central, recently renovated buildings, between €200,000 and €400,000. Some are never advertised — they're shared in person. Tell us your budget and target return, and we'll send back options ranked by ROI.

groupRouting.title: Six brands, one structure.
groupRouting.body: TriesteImmobiliare is part of the TriesteVillas ecosystem. Each brand owns a market: you come in through the right door.

valuationCta.title: What's your home really worth?
valuationCta.body: We believe in what we do: open a conversation with us and you'll see we'll sell your home at its best. Tell us about the property and we'll come back with an honest valuation — no obligation, and no commission on your side.

hero.title: Sell your home in Trieste with more strategy, less friction, and 0% seller commission.
hero.intro: First contact within 24h, valuation within 48h, online in as little as 7 days if the home is ready to launch well. We bring together speed, document control, strong marketing, and a process designed to disturb the seller as little as possible.

velocita.title: Speed
velocita.text: First contact within 24h, valuation within 48h. If the paperwork and the state of the property allow, we can go online in as little as 7 days.

zeroProvvigione.title: 0% seller commission
zeroProvvigione.text: On mandates signed by September 2026 the seller pays no commission. And if you sell and buy back through us, you get 25% off the purchase commission.
zeroProvvigione.buybackBadge: −25% if you buy back with us

mandatoSemplice.title: A simple mandate
mandatoSemplice.text: A 3-month mandate, no auto-renewal, no hidden costs. And if you decide not to continue when it expires, the material produced for your home stays yours.

checkup.title: Pre-sale check-up
checkup.text: Before rushing online, we check whether the home is genuinely ready. If anything needs verifying, we run a document check with outside surveyors, advance 50% of the cost of that check and, if it's missing, the cost of the energy certificate (APE) too.

materiale.title: Photos, video, drone, 3D tour
materiale.text: The material isn't there to put on a show: it's there to make the home easier to understand and to filter out pointless viewings. Photos, video, drone footage and a 3D tour help you sell better and waste less time.

liftingPreVendita.title: Pre-sale lift
liftingPreVendita.text: It doesn't always pay to put a home online exactly as it is: sometimes a small fix changes a great deal. We bring in an architect and tradespeople for quotes and weigh up whether a light touch genuinely makes sense. When it's worth it, we can even share in the investment.

ownerJourney.title: Owner journey
ownerJourney.text: Where we can, we concentrate viewings into a single day a week, at an agreed time. Less chaos, fewer interruptions, more control for the seller. Our goal isn't just to find a buyer: it's to do it through a more orderly, less intrusive process.

primaVendiPoiCerca.title: Sell well first, then start looking
primaVendiPoiCerca.text: Falling for the new place before you've sold your own is one of the most common mistakes: you end up negotiating in a hurry, from a weak position, often settling for less than you should. Sell well first, then choose at your leisure.

affittaMentreVendi.title: Let it while you sell
affittaMentreVendi.text: If it isn't the right moment to sell yet, we can look at putting the property to work temporarily with TriesteAffitti. It stays active, brings in income, and gives you more time to sell well.

acquirentiEsteri.title: Specialists in foreign buyers
acquirentiEsteri.text: Many of our buyers aren't from Trieste. We make everything simpler with orientation calls on Zoom, 3D tours, remote handling and fluent English. And when it's time to see it for real, we show them around the city.
acquirentiEsteri.quote: Trieste shouldn't just be shown. It needs to be explained.

houseTour.title: Guided house tours
houseTour.text: For those arriving from elsewhere, the point isn't just to see apartments: it's to grasp the areas, the logic, the differences and the potential. We run half-day and full-day house tours by car, taking buyers into the city — not just into the properties.

venditaRiservata.title: Discreet sale
venditaRiservata.text: Selling isn't only about posting on the portals. Sometimes the right move is a discreet sale, away from public channels, shared only with genuinely on-target buyers. When discretion matters, we run the deal off the showcase.

forzaDelGruppo.title: The strength of the group
forzaDelGruppo.text: With TriesteImmobiliare you're not working with a single sign over the door. When it helps, we also bring in TriesteVillas, FriuliVillas, LignanoVillas and TriesteAffitti: short-term lets, reallocating capital, or moves better suited to your next step.

process.title: From the first call to completion, in plain sight.
process.subtitle: An orderly, legible process, built to take friction away from the seller.

call.title: A call with the owner
call.text: You tell us about the property and your situation. We work out straight away whether and how we can sell it well.

docs.title: Paperwork and viewing
docs.text: You send us the documents, we come to see the home within 24h, and we check it's ready to launch.

online.title: Material and listing
online.text: Photos, video, drone and 3D tour. If the documents allow, we go online within 7 days.

visits.title: Concentrated viewings
visits.text: Viewings grouped into a single day a week, at an agreed time. Fewer interruptions, more control.

deal.title: Negotiation and completion
deal.text: We handle offers and negotiation through to completion. You walk away with the result, and no commission on your side.

closing.title: An honest valuation, no obligation.
closing.text: We believe in what we do: open a conversation with us and you'll see we'll sell your home at its best. Tell us everything and we'll come back with a strategic valuation of your property.

sell.blocksTitle: What changes when you sell with us

faqQ.0: How much does it cost to sell with TriesteImmobiliare?
faqQ.1: How long is the sales mandate?
faqQ.2: How quickly does my property go online?
faqQ.3: What is included in the selling service?
faqQ.4: Can I sell my property discreetly?

hero.title: Buying and investing in Trieste.
hero.intro: Trieste offers attractive yields on lot sizes that are still within reach. We help you work out where and how, with the numbers in hand and the acquisition costs laid out plainly.

narrative.title: A city you can read, not one you have to guess at.
narrative.body: A compact historic centre, steady rental demand from the university, healthcare and the port, and prices per square metre still reasonable against other cities in the North. It's a market where the right property, bought well, works for you. But it has to be read: yield, constraints and potential shift from one area to the next.
narrative.incomeBody: We don't sell the deal of the century. We work on units that produce sensible income, with numbers that hold up even once you look at them net of costs.

ricercaLibera.title: Open search
ricercaLibera.text: Tell us what you're after: budget, the works you'd allow, constraints, the make-up of your household, intended use. We send back a list of ideas, not a flyer.

ricercaROI.title: Search by net yield / ROI
ricercaROI.text: Looking to invest? Tell us your budget and target return. We send back a case study with options ranked by ROI, factoring in all-in acquisition costs.

teaser.title: Some opportunities aren't advertised. They're told.
teaser.body: We hold more than twenty already-let units in central, recently renovated buildings, between €200,000 and €400,000. By their nature they never reach the portals: we share them in person, with genuinely on-target buyers. Leave us a line or two about yourself and we'll work out together whether they suit your capital.
teaser.disclaimer: Properties that can't be advertised, shared privately with on-target buyers.

howItWorks.title: Half an hour to point your search in the right direction.
howItWorks.subtitle: Unless you're a local, the best approach is to spend half an hour with us working out how to steer the search.

brief.title: Tell us your goal
brief.text: Budget, target return, time horizon and how much management you want. A few lines are enough.

shortlist.title: We build the case study
shortlist.text: We select the on-target options, off-market ones included, and rank them by ROI with all-in acquisition costs.

call.title: Orientation call
call.text: Half an hour together to read the numbers, understand the areas, and choose the right moves.

close.title: Selection and purchase
close.text: We support the technical and document checks, the negotiation and completion. All the way to the keys.

cta.title: Start by understanding what Trieste can offer you.
cta.text: Send us a detailed enquiry and we'll work on your case. No obligation: just clear numbers to reason with.

immobili.title: Properties
immobili.intro: Every property currently available in Trieste and province, grouped by area.

buyerHelp.title: Tell us what you're looking for.
buyerHelp.text: Tell us your budget, the works you'd allow, your constraints and intended use: we'll send a tailored list of ideas, including properties not yet listed.

listing.empty: Nothing in this area at the moment. Tell us what you're after and we'll let you know the moment one comes up.

property.locationApprox: Approximate location within the area. The exact position is shared on request.

group.title: Different brands, a single direction.
group.intro: A property ecosystem built around specialisation. TriesteVillas is the parent company from which a system of vertical brands has grown, each designed to serve a different market with more clarity, more focus and more consistency.

ecosystem.title: A system built properly.
ecosystem.body: Not every property is sold, let or managed the same way. A luxury home, a residential apartment, a rental, a commercial asset or a premium property out of town each call for different language, processes and strategies. That's why we didn't put everything under one badge: we built an ecosystem of specialised brands.
ecosystem.tagline: Not the same look, not a repeated name. The same working culture.

group.brandsSubtitle: One structure covering every property need across Trieste and the whole of Friuli Venezia Giulia.

tsv.name: TriesteVillas
tsv.desc: The parent company and the premium/luxury hub in Trieste, as well as the group's marketing and back-office engine. Hand-picked properties, qualified buyers, a strong international focus.

tsi.name: TriesteImmobiliare
tsi.desc: The group's brand for residential Trieste and province up to around €500,000. Clean paperwork, quality of presentation, operational efficiency, less wasted effort.

affitti.name: TriesteAffitti
affitti.desc: Lettings built with method: short-term, regulated and standard. Founded in 2013 for holiday rentals, it has matured into a more grown-up, orderly system.

friuli.name: FriuliVillas
friuli.tag: Premium across the rest of FVG
friuli.desc: Premium property across the rest of Friuli Venezia Giulia: Grado, Udine, Tarvisio, Lignano, Sappada. The territorial extension of the know-how built in Trieste.

business.name: TriesteBusiness
business.desc: Property and deals with a business bent: retail units, going concerns, land, buildings, offices, warehouses and hospitality. Assets to be read by a different logic from residential.

lignano.name: LignanoVillas
lignano.desc: Premium transactions in Lignano, read through a more international lens. For foreign buyers and owners who want structure, context and quality in how their asset is handled.

story.eyebrow: What we were, what we are
story.title: From hospitality to the group.
story.intro: TriesteImmobiliare was born inside a group that knows Trieste inside out, from the premium end to the everyday home.

start.title: Beginnings in fine hospitality
start.text: The group started out managing villas and apartments for an international clientele, largely German-speaking. That's where our reading of the city and its market was built.

pivot.title: The pivot to sales
pivot.text: Relationships and market knowledge turned into a sales practice. The lettings side matured into TriesteAffitti, the premium sales into TriesteVillas.

today.title: One group, clear roles
today.text: TriesteImmobiliare owns residential Trieste and province; TriesteVillas stays on the premium end, TriesteAffitti on rentals, FriuliVillas and LignanoVillas on the wider region, TriesteBusiness on commercial. Less spread, more clarity.

group.valuesTitle: One and the same working culture

specialised.title: Specialised, not generalist
specialised.text: Each brand has its own focus, its own language and its own strategy. None of the do-a-bit-of-everything agency mindset.

local.title: Local and independent
local.text: We know Trieste deeply, area by area, because it's home.

clarity.title: Clarity above all
clarity.text: Paperwork in order, realistic prices, terms in plain sight. No surprises halfway through.

journey.title: From first contact to completion
journey.text: We're with you at every stage, through an orderly process built to take weight off your shoulders.

group.ctaTitle: Come in through the right door.
group.ctaText: Every property segment calls for different tools. Our job is to build, for each client and each goal, the most fitting frame.

legal.rea: Registered with the Trieste Chamber of Commerce · REA no. TS 134793
